ObjectName.value: This luncheon group photo with several members of the Sarabhai family. Baroda, 1951

Categories.value: Vikram Sarabhai|Gita Sarabhai|Ambalal Sarabhai|Flickr images reviewed by FlickreviewR 2

ImageDescription.value: This luncheon group photo from July 5, 1951, is noteworthy for the several members of the Sarabhai family in attendance: Mr. Ambalal Sarabhai and three of his children - Dr. Vikram, Geeta, and Gira Sarabhai - along with Geeta's husband, Satyadev Mayor.  The Squibb-Sarabhai joint venture was progressing well in this first year of its operation. (Annotated by Nathan Hughes Hamilton)
